description: ReportLab is the time-proven, ultra-reliable open source engine for creating complex, data-driven PDF documents and charts.

documentation.example: from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas; c = canvas.Canvas('out.pdf'); c.drawString(72, 72, 'hi'); c.save()
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/reportlab && python3 reportlab.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/reportlab && python3 reportlab.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/reportlab && python3 reportlab.py --help`. PDF / chart generation library (RML, platypus).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: PDF / chart generation library (RML, platypus).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: PDF / chart generation library (RML, platypus).

metadata.example: from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas; c = canvas.Canvas('out.pdf'); c.drawString(72, 72, 'hi'); c.save()

name: reportlab

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
